DataType.Name: ORT_Vision_Camera_Responses
DataType.Description: Responses to camera requests. Sent from the vision system to the PLC

Member.Name: iCalibrate
Member.Description: A copy of the request once the inspection has been calibrated

Member.Name: iUpdateCalibration
Member.Description: A copy of the request once the calibration has been updated and distributed

Member.Name: iRun
Member.Description: The currently running inspection number or 0 if no inspection is running

Member.Name: iImageCaptured
Member.Description: The number of the inspection once the image has been captured, while the job is processing the image - after this, it is safe to move the part from under the camera

Member.Name: iSaveLast
Member.Description: A copy of the request once the last image has been saved

Member.Name: iLive
Member.Description: A copy of the Live request once it is received and processed

Member.Name: bHeartbeat
Member.Description: The heartbeat from the vision system to the PLC. Updated approximately every second.
